prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, Microsoft (MS) shows an annualized volatility of approximately 25-30%. For a 6-day forecast, this translates to roughly 1.9% daily standard deviation. The point estimate assumes no systematic drift over this short period. The confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal price distribution, with the 50% CI representing ±0.67 standard deviations, 80% CI representing ±1.28 standard deviations, and 90% CI representing ±1.64 standard deviations from the current price.
